typography.instructions: Import 'Epilogue' and 'Outfit' from Google Fonts. Use Epilogue for all headings (h1-h3) and Outfit for body text. Use JetBrains Mono for all financial numbers and data tables.

colors.rules: Avoid pure black (#000000). Use Dark Slate (#1E293B) for text. Use pastel accents for semantic meaning (Green=Income, Red=Expense), but keep them soft.

layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for containers. Use gap-6 for grids.
layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl (1rem) for cards, rounded-full for buttons.

cards.style: bg-white border border-border/60 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_2px_10px_-4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.style: rounded-xl border-border bg-slate-50/50 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 transition-all

navigation.style: Floating glassmorphism header or clean sidebar. For this student app, a top sticky nav with blur is best.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise/grain overlay (opacity 0.03) on the background to reduce digital sterility.
visual_enhancers.shapes: Use soft organic blobs in pastel colors as background decorations for the Landing Page.
visual_enhancers.motion: Use framer-motion. Page transitions: Opacity fade + slight Y-axis slide. Stagger children for lists.

hero_landing.alt: Student organizing notes on a wooden desk

student_life.alt: Group of students walking on campus

pages_structure.landing: Hero section with 'student_life' image. Features list with 'finance_concept'. Testimonials. CTA.
pages_structure.dashboard: Bento grid layout. Top row: Key Metrics (Total Balance, Monthly Spend). Middle: Income/Expense Chart (Recharts). Right col: Recent Transactions.
pages_structure.income_expense: Split view or Tabs. Left: Form (Add Transaction). Right: List of recent transactions with filters.
pages_structure.debts: Progress bars for each debt. Visual 'snowball' or 'avalanche' representation.
pages_structure.savings: Grid of 'Goal Cards' with circular progress indicators.
pages_structure.reports: Before/After comparison view using side-by-side charts.
pages_structure.profile: Simple card layout for user details and settings.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on pastel backgrounds has a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1. Use darker shades of the pastel color for text.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-primary on all interactive elements.
accessibility.screen_readers: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label.

instructions_to_main_agent: UPDATE src/index.css with the provided Tailwind variables.
USE 'Epilogue' font for headings. Add import to index.css.
CREATE a 'Layout' component that includes the Navigation and Footer.
ENSURE the Dashboard uses a Grid layout, not just a flex column.
USE the provided image URLs for the landing page.
APPLY the 'Anti-AI' rule: Do not use generic purple/blue gradients. Stick to the Cream/Slate/Emerald/Pastel palette.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors: separates good from extraordinary.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc.
